title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN GUILLERMO IN THE CITY OF LIPA

chunks.text:
H. No. 2347 / 55 OG No. 37, 7881 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2493, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN GUILLERMO IN THE CITY OF LIPA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Sala and Pagolingling Batain the City of Lipa are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said City to be known as the barrio of San Guillermo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
